\tzpentry{ID5830}{Universal Field Via Bridge Tunnel Theory SECOND PASS Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5830 introduces Universal Field Via Bridge Tunnel Theory SECOND PASS Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} S[g,\Psi] &= \int d^4x\,\sqrt{-g}\Big( \frac{1}{16\pi G}\,R + \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{matter}}(\Psi,g) + \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{TZP}}(\Psi,g) + \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{top}}(\Psi,g) \Big), \end{align}
